$comment: OpenProse version surfaces, grouped into independently-released TRACKS. bump-version.sh keeps each track internally consistent but lets tracks move independently. See RELEASE.md.

skill.description: The open-prose SKILL and the Claude + Codex plugin envelopes that deliver it. Locked together because the Claude Code marketplace deduplicates by manifest version: skill changes only reach plugin users when the manifest version advances, so the two plugin.json files and SKILL.md must move as one. Machine compatibility is carried separately by SKILL.md's runtime_contract, not by this X.Y.Z.

cli.description: The prose CLI npm package (@openprose/prose-cli) and its tarball installer default. Versioned independently of the skill/plugin and published through the OpenProse Release workflow.
